who: property managers processing 5–15 rent roll reports/month
offer: For property managers processing 5–15 rent roll reports/month, inaccurate reports cause cash flow gaps. We automate report generation instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate or delayed rent roll reports lead to cash flow gaps.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 property managers with demo
Community forums where property managers share tools
try_it: Let users try template-based report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress update in relevant community
